creator: joe@pavilion.net
text:
There's an important broken link on the releases index page on the web site: en/releases/index.sgml 1.18 (jfieber 22-Oct-97):

This latest release from our FreeBSD-stable branch is 1.31 (jkh 18-Sep-99): also available. Please see Getting 1.31 (jkh 18-Sep-99): FreeBSD for details.

The location in the handbook (stable.html) doesn't exist.
